gate_runs.detail: Full make test-e2e-all fast bucket passed (68/68). Groups/relay bucket fail-fast stopped at dm-self-heal.spec.ts:181 (AC-29), a spec untouched by this epic, before reaching the epic's own 4 retargeted specs. Decider (base:decider) ruled RETRY: scope a rerun to the epic's own specs rather than block on an unrelated pre-existing failure. Scoped rerun of groups-error-cases.spec.ts, groups-invite-guidance-state.spec.ts, groups-invite-pending-contact-selectable.spec.ts (6 tests) passed 6/6. dm-self-heal AC-29 filed as BACKLOG finding dm-self-heal-spec-ts-ac, not blocking this epic.

Opus stage 1: 4 findings (2x severity-3: stale comment referencing removed <option>, missing aria-disabled on disabled rows; 2x severity-2 inference notes: all-disabled guidance-state behavior confirmed non-regression, opacity/contrast noted WCAG-1.4.3-exempt). Both severity-3 findings fixed; re-review confirmed clean fixpoint; ownership-ledger.json written. Codex stage 2: no discrete correctness issues found.

manual_validation.evidence: User reviewed e2e-captured screenshots of the row-based picker (2 selectable rows, letter-avatar+npub fallback rendering, green selected-state border, disabled Send Invite until selection) on 2026-07-14 and approved via AskUserQuestion: 'Satisfied, ship it'.
